{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324013647EDEE147FFB397C8D4ECE"}"},"total":3606},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7507590470597591833","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很少能看到这么专注于种田的修仙文，不是那种一边说要苟然后一边浪个不停，就是人情往来和田间地头的点点滴滴，虽然一些设定有小瑕疵，但行文流畅，角色基本也都带点脑子，近期值得一读的好书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748000840,"group_id":"7482631438781664281","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2+TC+UmprQI/3PDL1e/5gvj5BnWCaRDD9Y2cZpcbuGz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1794035456678413","user_name":"枫树大魔导"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1794035456678413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1648218553,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7482631438781664281","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常种田流+稳健修仙流+无女主多道侣+系统+屯屯鼠】
当同门天骄为秘境机缘杀红眼时，我在灵田里给萝卜浇了三百年灵泉。
当魔道巨擘血祭百万修士时，我正在用仙藤捆妖绳给灵田扎篱笆。
哪怕上界仙人跨界而来，盖压【天元界】所有修仙者。
我还是该吃吃、该喝喝、遇事不往心里搁……
